candidate_problem_record.subject: 数学、物理、生物、化学
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Sixty pairs of measurements were taken at random to estimate the relation between variables X and Y. A least squares regression line was fitted to the collected data. The resulting residual plot is as follows. Which of the following conclusions is appropriate?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。
